userStories.title: Initialize Vite + TypeScript workspace
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clean Vite and TypeScript project so the application can run locally and build for static hosting.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run dev starts local server
npm run build creates production bundle
Default page loads without console errors

userStories.title: Add lint, typecheck and unit test scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want baseline quality tooling so all future tickets have a consistent definition of done.

userStories.title: Create static local-only architecture policy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want guardrails that prevent privacy-breaking dependencies from being introduced.
acceptanceCriteria: No backend API dependency required for core flow
Project can be deployed as static hosting output

userStories.title: Create responsive application shell
userStories.description: As a user, I want a structured responsive layout so the dashboard works on desktop and mobile devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop layout uses three columns at large widths
No horizontal scrolling on common viewports

userStories.title: Create theme tokens and base styles
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reusable theme tokens so all modules share a consistent visual identity.
userStories.notes: Use white, graphite, muted green palette.

userStories.title: Collect locale and platform browser signals
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to collect low-risk browser metadata so later modules can analyze it.
acceptanceCriteria: Do Not Track state collected when available
Unsupported values return safe fallback strings

userStories.title: Collect device capability browser signals
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to collect device capability signals for local analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Device pixel ratio collected when available
Unsupported values return safe fallback strings

userStories.title: Collect rendering engine browser signals
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to collect rendering information when supported so uniqueness and device traits can be estimated.
acceptanceCriteria: Graceful fallback used when blocked or unsupported
No uncaught runtime errors if WebGL unavailable

userStories.title: Normalize all collected signals into one snapshot
userStories.description: As a developer, I want one normalized data structure so all modules consume the same source of truth.

userStories.title: Create animated intro sequence
userStories.description: As a user, I want an opening statement that explains the concept before the dashboard appears.
acceptanceCriteria: Intro text appears on first load
Signal count derived from snapshot fields
Reduced motion users receive minimal animation

userStories.title: Create receipt layout component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable receipt-style component so findings can be displayed clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Receipt row component renders label/value pairs
Receipt supports variable number of rows

userStories.title: Populate receipt with core fingerprint fields
userStories.description: As a user, I want the receipt to show key browser signals immediately.

userStories.title: Populate receipt with advanced fingerprint fields
userStories.description: As a user, I want the receipt to show additional system traits when available.

userStories.title: Implement entropy heuristic scoring
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a deterministic heuristic that estimates fingerprint uniqueness risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Weighted score calculated from selected signals

userStories.title: Display privacy posture and uniqueness estimate on receipt
userStories.description: As a user, I want the receipt to summarize my uniqueness risk in understandable terms.

userStories.title: Add receipt copy action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to copy the receipt text for sharing or documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Receipt text copied to clipboard on supported browsers

userStories.title: Add receipt rerun action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to rerun the audit so current values can refresh.

userStories.title: Add receipt image export action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export the receipt as an image for sharing.
acceptanceCriteria: Receipt card exported as PNG or equivalent image

userStories.title: Create Zero Click OSINT card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable intelligence card component for passive findings.

userStories.title: Render Zero Click OSINT findings
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what is knowable without interacting.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards rendered for timezone, language, browser family, device class
Cards rendered for screen profile, rendering engine, input capability
Approximate region clearly labeled as heuristic when shown

userStories.title: Create permissions adapter
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a safe permissions abstraction so browser support differences are handled consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: No uncaught runtime errors on unsupported browsers

userStories.title: Calculate Permission Debt score
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a deterministic score representing cumulative granted permissions risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Denied or unsupported permissions do not increase score incorrectly

userStories.title: Render Permission Debt module
userStories.description: As a user, I want to review current permission states and cumulative risk.
userStories.notes: Only show supported states where possible.

userStories.title: Create shadow profile inference schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a strict structure for inferred statements so no claim is presented as fact.

userStories.title: Implement conservative shadow profile rules
userStories.description: As a developer, I want bounded inference rules based on observable signals.
acceptanceCriteria: At least four inference rules implemented

userStories.title: Render Shadow Profile module
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see likely assumptions third parties could make from passive signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Every card visibly marked as inference

userStories.title: Create threat model rules engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I want deterministic mappings from findings to user-relevant risks.

userStories.title: Render Threat Model module
userStories.description: As a user, I want my technical findings translated into realistic risks.
acceptanceCriteria: At least four risk categories shown

userStories.title: Create hardening recommendation rules
userStories.description: As a developer, I want actionable recommendations generated from findings.
acceptanceCriteria: Rules respond to profile separation opportunities
At least five possible actions exist

userStories.title: Render Hardening Actions module
userStories.description: As a user, I want practical steps to improve my privacy and security posture.

userStories.title: Add persistent privacy footer
userStories.description: As a user, I want explicit trust messaging so I understand how the site handles data.

userStories.title: Add accessibility support
userStories.description: As a user, I want the site usable with keyboard navigation and accessible defaults.

userStories.title: Add reduced motion behavior
userStories.description: As a user, I want animations minimized when my system requests reduced motion.
acceptanceCriteria: No content hidden when motion disabled

userStories.title: Create automated test coverage
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated tests for critical logic and smoke flows.

userStories.title: Validate production static build
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clean production build ready for deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: All modules load from static hosting
